violations.text: Handwashing is lacking at the front counter hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the (areas of the kitchen ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The (walls ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed small holes and gaps near plumbing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
